series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on Council members relating to their appointment and tenure on the Council. Records may include: Correspondence, meeting notes, billings, receipts, travel and per diem reports, training notes and all other records within the agency’s possession relating to specific members and appointment documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: three (3) state fiscal years from end of service, or transferred Machine Readable format ; Electronic: three (3) state fiscal years from end of service. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
